name: hcportal_deleteNewsflash
description: Soft-deletes a portal newsflash by setting IsDeleted=1 and UpdatedAt=GETUTCDATE(). The newsflash immediately stops being returned by hcportal_getPendingNewsflashes. Associated HC.PortalNewsflashRead records are retained for audit; hcportal_getNewsflashReaders continues to work on soft-deleted newsflashes.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth with NULL callerParamString.

parameters.name: newsflashId
parameters.description: Required: the newsflash to soft-delete. Validated for NULL before auth. Must exist and not already be soft-deleted.

rowsets.name: SuccessEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any outcome — success, validation failure, auth failure, or runtime error.

columns.name: ErrorMessage
columns.description: NULL on success, error message on failure

sideEffects: UPDATE HC.PortalNewsflash SET IsDeleted=1, UpdatedAt=GETUTCDATE() WHERE NewsflashId=@newsflashId
breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change soft-delete to hard-delete — PortalNewsflashRead rows depend on the parent row existing
